ValidationRule.description: Placement cannot be Confirmed with missing or zero Bill/Pay rates. Please ensure the Job rates have flowed down correctly.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Confirmed"), OR( Regular_Bill_Rate__c <= 0, Regular_Pay_Rate__c <= 0, ISBLANK(Regular_Bill_Rate__c), ISBLANK(Regular_Pay_Rate__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Placement cannot be Confirmed with missing or zero Bill/Pay rates. Please ensure the Job rates have flowed down correctly.
